action: Add a repeated-trial statistical gate above the randomized acoustic codeword classifier.

progress.finding: Repeated independently randomized acoustic codeword outcomes can be compared with the declared random exact-match null using an exact binomial upper-tail probability, but only when trial records are complete and no environmental confound is present.
progress.verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit source.

handoff: Vercel Studio should maintain an append-only complete trial ledger, run independently randomized R-039 challenges, and call evaluateRepeatedAcousticTrials only after each trial has passed through the existing render, spectral, temporal, and confound gates.
limits: No browser, microphone, iPhone Safari, conscious-audibility, independence, or exclusive-causation proof was produced.
